untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detecting 'single-period momentum decline (ROC turns negative)' but ROC (Rate of Change) is not in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. Also requires quantifying 'whipsaw behavior' which is a qualitative market microstructure pattern not directly measurable with provided indicators. ATR comparison uses approximation: atr_20 > sma_20 as proxy for 'ATR elevated above 20-day MA by >10%' but exact percentage elevation cannot be expressed without custom calculations.
translation_notes: Attempted translation using RSI as momentum proxy (RSI decline mirrors momentum loss). Entry uses whipsaw proxy (close reversing prior close direction). ATR elevation approximated as atr_20 > sma_20. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to capture counter-trend nature. Stop loss set to 3% per specification. Hold time set to 5 bars per exit conditions.
